actions.value:
Hi,
thanks for reaching out.
Let me ask you a few questions:

1. have you ever shared the logs with Edge wallet? Which note did you enter?
2. Have you used one of the providers available in Buy / Sell section, such as Bitrefill, Ionia or Bity AFTER sharing the logs?
3. Have you seen an in-app notification asking you to migrate the wallets?
4. When creating an Edge account, everything is completely encrypted before being backed up, meaning not even Edge can see the username, password, or the transactions inside the wallet.

If you think your account is compromised, please IMMEDIATELY STOP USING IT AND DO NOT RECEIVE ANY ADDITIONAL FUNDS AS MORE CAN BE LOST.

With that said, please fill the replies in the form here https://form.asana.com/?k=g4MFFV8sJJC6P-nxQb192Q&d=9976422036640
